title: Workflow Cannon documentation deletion and archive evidence register

entries.rationale: Orphaned JSON snapshot of a dashboard export with zero in-repo references; duplicated information available from live `pnpm exec wk run dashboard-summary` / extension surfaces.
entries.replacement: Run `pnpm exec wk run dashboard-summary '{}'` (or the Cursor extension dashboard) when you need a current machine-readable summary.

evidence.preRemovalVerification: Repository-wide search found no imports or prose references to dashboard_out.json (2026-05-16).
evidence.gitHistoryNote: Prior file contents remain reachable via git history on the parent commit of the removal.

entries.rationale: Orphaned JSON snapshot parallel to dashboard_out.json with zero in-repo references; not produced by workspace-kit CI or packaging.
entries.replacement: Same as dashboard_out.json — use `dashboard-summary` or extension exports.

evidence.preRemovalVerification: Repository-wide search found no imports or prose references to dashboard_summary.json (2026-05-16).
evidence.gitHistoryNote: Prior file contents remain reachable via git history on the parent commit of the removal.

entries.rationale: Large (~1.5MB) root-level tasks export with zero in-repo references; live task state belongs in `.workspace-kit/tasks/workspace-kit.db` (or JSON opt-out per kit config), not a static repo-root dump.
entries.replacement: Use `pnpm exec wk run list-tasks`, `get-task`, or read the configured task store; do not rely on ad-hoc root JSON exports.

evidence.preRemovalVerification: Repository-wide search found no references to repo-root tasks.json as a data source (2026-05-16).
evidence.gitHistoryNote: Prior export contents remain reachable via git history on the parent commit of the removal.
